description: Generates wrappers targeting MediatR v12. Full API surface with relaxed generic constraints, Task-returning void handlers, and custom notification publishers. Best for greenfield projects or teams standardized on MediatR 12.x.

rules.description: Include INotificationPublisher for custom publishing strategies
rules.reason: v12 custom notification publisher enables parallel, sequential, and fire-and-forget notification dispatch.
Required companion type for INotificationPublisher implementations.

rules.description: Use relaxed 'notnull' constraint on pipeline behaviors
rules.reason: v12 relaxed from IRequest<TResponse> to notnull. Enables open-generic pipeline registrations.
v12 void handlers return Task, not Task<Unit>. Cleaner API -- no Unit.Value/Unit.Task ceremony.
Full streaming support with relaxed constraints.

notes: Targeted v12 wrappers require MediatR >= 12.0.0. Provides the cleanest API surface with relaxed constraints and modern patterns. NOT backward-compatible with v10/v11.
